{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Wei clan archives
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has worked in the [[Wei clan archives]] for much of the past five years.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
